intro: I am excited to apply for the Junior Data Engineer (AWS) role with CornerStone Technology Talent Services. This position aligns well with my hands-on background in data pipelines, SQL/Python engineering, and AWS-based data workflows.
body: At CITI, I designed and maintained ETL/ELT pipelines using Python, Pandas, and SQL for telemetry and reporting workloads, including data ingestion from 6,000+ endpoints. I built and optimized data models, implemented data quality checks, and collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable analytics datasets.

Your role's focus on scalable pipelines, data modeling, troubleshooting, and clear documentation matches how I work. I also bring practical AWS experience with Glue, Athena, and S3, plus strong SQL tuning and schema design foundations that support reliable, high-performing data solutions.
conclusion: I would welcome the opportunity to contribute to your team and support impactful data initiatives across the organization.
